description: Managed database-as-a-service offerings across relational, document, key-value, graph, and vector databases.

entries.name: Supabase
entries.summary: Open-source Firebase alternative providing a managed Postgres database with auth, storage, realtime, and edge functions.
entries.freeTier: 2 free projects, 500MB database, 1GB file storage, 5GB bandwidth/month, projects pause after 1 week inactivity.

entries.name: Neon
entries.summary: Serverless Postgres with branching (database copies for dev/test) and scale-to-zero compute.
entries.freeTier: 0.5GB storage, generous compute hours/month, unlimited branches on free tier.

entries.name: PlanetScale
entries.summary: Serverless MySQL-compatible platform built on Vitess, with non-blocking schema migrations and branching workflows.
entries.freeTier: Hobby plan free with limited storage and row reads/writes per month.

entries.name: MongoDB Atlas
entries.summary: Fully managed MongoDB document database with a free shared-cluster tier that never expires.
entries.freeTier: M0 cluster: 512MB storage, shared RAM/vCPU, no time limit.

entries.name: Firebase (Firestore/Realtime DB)
entries.summary: Google's mobile/web app backend platform including Firestore NoSQL database, auth, hosting, and analytics.
entries.freeTier: Spark plan free: 1GB Firestore storage, 50k reads/20k writes per day.
entries.paidFrom: Blaze plan is pay-as-you-go beyond Spark limits.

entries.name: Upstash
entries.summary: Serverless Redis, Kafka, and vector database with per-request pricing ideal for spiky/serverless workloads.
entries.freeTier: 10,000 commands/day free on Redis, 10,000 vectors free on vector DB.

entries.name: Redis Cloud
entries.summary: Official managed Redis offering with a permanently free small database tier.
entries.freeTier: 30MB free database, shared infrastructure, no time limit.
entries.paidFrom: Flexible plans from ~$5/month for fixed dedicated.

entries.name: CockroachDB Cloud
entries.summary: Distributed SQL database that's Postgres wire-compatible, designed for resilience and horizontal scale.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with 10GiB storage and 50M request units/month.
entries.paidFrom: Standard plan billed on usage above free tier.

entries.name: Turso
entries.summary: Edge-replicated SQLite database (built on libSQL) for low-latency reads close to users.
entries.freeTier: 500 databases, 9GB total storage, 1B row reads/month on free tier.

entries.name: Pinecone
entries.summary: Managed vector database purpose-built for similarity search and RAG/AI applications.
entries.freeTier: Starter tier free: 1 project, ~2GB storage (serverless), limited read/write units.

entries.name: Weaviate Cloud
entries.summary: Open-source vector database with managed cloud hosting and hybrid (vector + keyword) search.
entries.freeTier: Sandbox cluster free for 14 days; open-source self-hosted version is free indefinitely.

entries.name: Astra DB (DataStax)
entries.summary: Managed Cassandra-based database with vector search support, built for high-scale NoSQL workloads.
entries.freeTier: 25M reads/writes and 25GB storage free per month, no expiry.

entries.name: ElephantSQL (Postgres)
entries.summary: Simple managed PostgreSQL hosting with a small permanently-free tier, good for quick prototypes.
entries.freeTier: 20MB storage, shared instance, no time limit.

entries.name: Xata
entries.summary: Serverless Postgres platform with built-in full-text search, file attachments, and branching.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited storage and request quotas for small projects.
